title: Flames, smoke rise from US Consulate in Dubai after suspected attack
fullText: Flames, smoke rise from US Consulate in Dubai after suspected attackNewsFeedFlames and black smoke were seen rising from the US Consulate in Dubai after a suspected attack amid Iranian retaliation for US-Israeli strikes.Published On 3 Mar 2026
summary: Flames and black smoke were seen rising from the US Consulate in Dubai after a suspected attack.
